nl_query: What is the average time between exam schedule creation and board creation?
failed_sql: SELECT avg(exs.created_at - b.created_at) AS avg_time_between_creation FROM exam_schedule_cache AS esc JOIN board AS b ON esc.id = b.exam_id JOIN exam_schedule_cache AS exs ON exs.academic_year = esc.academic_year WHERE exs.created_at > b.created_at
